title: Early Summer's Encounter
overview: On the day before summer holiday, Ichika meets a girl in a mirror.

title: The Neighboring Night Sky
overview: An old friend's former boyfriend causes some trouble for Ichika and Manatsu.

title: The Heat of the Sandy Beach
overview: While rescuing a former classmate at the beach, Ichika loses her father's very valuable watch.

title: Sudden Storm by the Lake Shore
overview: During a camping trip, a girl in Ichika's cabin becomes stranded while attempting to meet a boy.

title: The Flowering of Tears
overview: Satsuki develops a crush on a boy she meets on the day of the fireworks festival.

title: The Flush of Damp Skin
overview: Ichika sees Sei-san with her neighbor Saya-san and as she runs away she breaks her pearl necklace.

title: The Jealousy of a Twig
overview: Ichika discovers that she is changing unusually. After a gust of wind scatters Kai's homework report, Ichika resolves to recover it.

title: The Impulse of a Falling Flower
overview: As part of a volunteer activity, Ichika gives a wreath of dried flowers to a mentally unstable hospital patient.

title: The Pain of Love
overview: A trip with friends to a shrine dedicated to lovers causes Keiko and Satsuki to reflect on unpleasant memories.

title: Reunion Beyond the Grave
overview: Ichika finds that she cannot cast away the magic charm. The Tachibana family visits the graves of their ancestors, and Ichika has a reunion of her own.

title: The Surge of Separation
overview: Ichika dreams a new dream about Manatsu and herself. When Michiru attempts to find out the truth, the power of the Djinn sends disaster her way.

title: The Poetry of Fragments
overview: Ichika ventures into the house next door to determine the truth once and for all.
